faqs.question: How much does rat extermination cost in Manhasset?
faqs.answer: Rat extermination services in Manhasset typically range from $350 to $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and number of entry points requiring sealing. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Manhasset residents. Rat infestations require immediate attention, and our team is ready to respond quickly to homes and businesses throughout the North Shore area, typically arriving within 24 hours of your call.

faqs.question: Do rats in Manhasset pose health risks to my family?
faqs.answer: Yes, rats carry serious diseases including leptospirosis, hantavirus, and salmonella. They contaminate food sources, damage property through gnawing, and their droppings can trigger allergies and respiratory issues. Professional extermination is essential to protect your family's health and your home's structural integrity.
